info.title: Information
info.subtitle: About the service, technical details and legal documents.
info.aboutText: archimap is a map of architectural objects and a workspace for collecting, validating, and refining building data. The service combines an interactive map, building card, search by name, address, style, and architect, plus OpenStreetMap tag editing in one interface.
info.aboutTextExtended: Users can find buildings, compare the current data, suggest updates, and review their edit history in the account area. Moderators and administrators get tools for field-level review, partial acceptance of edits, comments, user role management, and platform configuration.
info.aboutFeatureMap: A map with search, OSM tag filters, and a detailed building card.
info.aboutFeatureEdits: User-submitted edits with a transparent moderation flow and edit history.
info.aboutFeatureAdmin: Account and admin sections for edit review, access control, and service operations.

header.authLoginSubtitle: Sign in to save edits and track how moderation moves on your changes.

styles.title: Styles
styles.subtitle: Override regional architecture-style restrictions for specific regions or region masks.
styles.loadFailed: Failed to load style override rules
styles.saveFailed: Failed to save style override rule
styles.deleteFailed: Failed to delete style override rule
styles.confirmDelete: Delete the rule for "{style}" and region mask "{pattern}"?

defaults.title: Built-in defaults
defaults.description: These rules are baked into the application and are applied when no admin override matches.
defaults.globalHint: Available in all regions by default

inline.noOverrides: There are no custom rules for this style yet.
inline.currentRulesDescription: You can edit or delete existing overrides for the selected style here.
inline.allowHelp: Allow expands the built-in region list for this style. Use it to add a new country or region on top of the default scope.
inline.denyHelp: Deny excludes a region even if it is already part of the built-in rule. Use it to hide the style for one country or region inside the default coverage.
inline.onlyHelp: This mode keeps the style available only for the specified mask. Under the hood it creates a global deny "*" plus a more specific allow for your mask.
inline.replaceCleanupFailed: The new rule was saved, but the old region mask could not be removed automatically.

form.allowHint: Force this style to stay available for matching regions.
form.denyHint: Force this style to disappear for matching regions.

data.title: Data
data.subtitle: Add sync regions from the map, track PMTiles, and inspect run history.
data.confirmDelete: Delete region "{label}"? This will remove its PMTiles, membership, and orphan data that no longer belongs to other regions.

summary.regionSourceValue: Geofabrik countries with osmfr fallback extracts, Geofabrik US states, and osmfr Russia regions

map.title: Region map
map.description: The map uses Geofabrik extracts for most countries, osmfr for fallback country coverage and Russia regions, and Geofabrik states for the US.
map.selectionHint: Click a region on the map to prepare a new draft.

filterTags.title: Filter tag allowlist
filterTags.description: Shows all OSM tags currently present in the local database. Checking a tag adds it to the public filter UI allowlist.
filterTags.empty: No OSM tags are currently available for filtering. Wait for an import or filter-tag cache rebuild.
filterTags.unsavedWarning: There are unsaved allowlist changes. They will not affect public filters until you click "Save allowlist".
filterTags.confirmDiscard: There are unsaved filter tag allowlist changes. Leave without saving?

edits.search: Search by address or building ID
edits.selectHint: Select an edit in the table or on map.
edits.syncedArchiveHint: Read-only history for edits already published to OSM.
edits.syncedArchiveReadOnlyHelp: This edit has already been synchronized. Decisions and other moderation actions are disabled here.
edits.orphanedHelp: Accepted local data is no longer attached to an existing OSM contour. Reassign or archive it.
edits.missingTargetHelp: The original OSM object disappeared from the local contours dataset. Merge is blocked until reassignment.
edits.osmChangedHelp: Upstream OSM data changed after this edit was created. Review the diff before merge and use force or reassignment if needed.
edits.reassignHelp: Enter the current OSM object that should receive this edit or the already merged local data.
edits.reassignInvalidTarget: Enter a valid target osmType and osmId
edits.deleteHelp: Deletes the edit record permanently. For accepted edits it also removes merged local data, but only when that merged state is not shared with other accepted edits.
edits.deleteBlocked: This edit cannot be permanently deleted right now.
edits.deleteBlockedSharedMergedState: Permanent deletion is blocked because this building already has other accepted edits and the merged local data is shared.
edits.deleteConfirm: Permanently delete edit {label}? This action cannot be undone.
